name: harness-forge

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Create and upgrade a self-improving Claude Code harness (self-healing failure ledger, per-file lesson memory, regression evals, small-model elevation, safety hooks) in any project with one slash command.

description: Self-improving Claude Code harnesses: one command installs self-healing failure capture, lesson memory with promotion lifecycle, regression evals, small-model elevation agents, and fixture-tested safety hooks into any project.
